hermes.what: structured answers, plans, 888_HOLD alerts, verdict summaries
hermes.limit: 1 main message + 1 optional clarification per session

openclaw.spam_policy: SILENCE by default — no trigger = no speak

apexmax.limit: 0 messages to group — verdict flows through Hermes
apexmax.spam_policy: NEVER in group — Hermes is its mouth

flow.question: hermes answers
flow.do_something: hermes plans → openclaw executes → hermes confirms
flow.verdict_request: hermes prepares case → apexmax judges → hermes announces

no_spam.rule: one agent speaks once per session in group
no_spam.violation_action: state conflict once → ask Arif for correction

sovereign_override.rule: Arif is final — overrides HOLD with explicit human SEAL are recorded, not argued
